documentation.file_docstring: Map of OpenAI voice names to similar Twilio Polly voices.
inline_comments: Default Polly voice when no mapping is found.

Map OpenAI voice names to Twilio Polly equivalents. Falls through if already a valid Polly/Google voice. @param voice - OpenAI voice name (alloy, echo, etc.) or Polly voice name @returns Polly voice name suitable for Twilio TwiML
Already a Polly/Google voice - pass through
Map OpenAI voices to Polly equivalents
Check if a voice name is a known OpenAI voice.
Get all supported OpenAI voice names.

functions.doc: Map OpenAI voice names to Twilio Polly equivalents.   Falls through if already a valid Polly voice.      voice - OpenAI
